author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Three fixes. (1) Language Landscape: 'You built your bookmark manager with these' → 'Your first project in Phase 1 uses these' and similar fix for the Rust section. (2) Workspace: Practice exercise now creates 'test-folder' instead of 'guild-projects', avoiding conflict with the real setup later in the chapter. (3) Workspace: Added parenthetical defining ~ as home directory shorthand with examples for Mac/Linux and Windows paths.
